top.name: Corpse Harvest
top.rules_text: Destroy a corpse within range 2. Gain 2 mana and draw 1 card.

channel.name: Corpse Harvest (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain 2 armor per tile between you and the corpse

bottom.name: Marrow Shield
bottom.rules_text: Gain armor equal to the number of corpses on the board (1-6).

channel.name: Marrow Shield (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain 2 shield per adjacent corpse
